rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use valid component ports in AGREE contracts only when represented through variables or outputs
Ground all AGREE variables in the current AADL model or explicit declarations
generic_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in the intended target component or implementation scope
Preserve existing AADL architecture during model fusion
Use valid component ports in AGREE contracts only when represented through variables or outputs
Ground all AGREE variables in the current AADL model or explicit declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax for AGREE contracts
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
